about.heading:
Creating Motion
That Captures Attention
about.col1: I'm A.rvxStudio, a freelance video editor and motion graphics artist focused on creating visually striking content for creators, brands and digital products.
about.col2: From short-form content to advanced motion graphics and UI animation, I help ideas become engaging visual experiences.
